body_txt: This is the unsettling variety of blue eyes given to particularly degenerate and creepy characters. They tend to be either sort of light and watery, extremely pale, or the type that seems to be too open , to the point where one starts to hope they'll blink soon. This may overlap with Icy Blue Eyes , for certain types of creeps, and even with Innocent Blue Eyes for especially sinister Fake Cuties , Psychopathic Manchildren , and the like . Compare Occult Blue Eyes and Red Eyes, Take Warning , contrast Innocent Blue Eyes . noreallife
